questions: amader whole area te net nai
service disruption er notification pabo kivabe?
aaj raat e ki maintenance ache?
answers: ISP Digital er service status check korte status.ispdigital.com e jan. Real-time update paben shob ongoing outage ar maintenance er. Area-wise status o dekhte parben!
Apnar area te ekhon ekta scheduled maintenance cholche — estimated restoration time 2 ghonta. ISP Digital advance e SMS notification pathiyechilo. Inconvenience er jonno sorry!
Network outage hole ISP Digital er technical team immediately kaj shuru kore dey. Most outages 2-4 ghontar moddhe resolve hoy. Critical issues er jonno emergency team 24/7 kore!
Planned maintenance normally raat 2am-6am er moddhe hoy — jokhon minimum users online thake. ISP Digital minimum 24 ghonta age SMS ar email e notify kore.
Area-wide outage hole multiple team simultaneously kaj kore. Fiber cut, power failure, ba equipment issue — je karon e hok, ISP Digital fastest possible restoration ensure kore!
Service disruption notification pabar jonno ISP Digital app e push notification enable korun ar amader Facebook page follow korun. Real-time update paben shob somoy!
Nationwide outage rare, kintu hole ISP Digital er shob social media channel e update dey. status.ispdigital.com e nationwide status map dekhte paren.
Outage er jonno compensation ISP Digital er policy onujayi automatic apply hoy. 24 ghontar beshi downtime hole apnar next bill e credit adjust hobe. Alada claim korar dorkar nai!
Emergency maintenance sometimes unexpected equipment failure er karone hoy — advance notice dewa shomhob hoy na. ISP Digital ekhetre jototaratari shombhob fix kore ar real-time update dey.
Restoration er exact time dewa kathin karon problem er severity er upor depend kore. Kintu ISP Digital er target holo maximum 4 ghontar moddhe service restore kora. Apnar patience er jonno dhonnobad!
